description: Implement a tokenizer from a local spec file and satisfy tests.
prompt: Read SPEC.md and implement tokenizeCommand(input) in src/tokenize.mjs. Export it through src/index.mjs and make the tests pass.

files.SPEC.md:
# Command tokenizer spec

Implement tokenizeCommand(input):

- Split on whitespace outside quotes.
- Preserve text inside double quotes as one token without the quote characters.
- Ignore repeated whitespace between tokens.
- Return [] for an empty or whitespace-only input.
- Throw Error("Unclosed quote") when a double quote is opened but not closed.
